attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   
	RANK () OVER   (ORDER BY SMOFADJ.SS_CODE,SMOFADJ.GES_PK_ID) + MAX_VAL FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY,
	SMOFADJ.SS_CODE,
	FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY||'_UNK' as BOOK_TYPE_CD,
	-(FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY+1000000) as DISTRIBUTION_ID,  
	-(FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY+2000000) as PERIOD_COUNTER,    
	SMOFADJ.GES_PK_ID,
	'ADJ' as SS_TABLE_CD
FROM 
	( SELECT NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CODE, STMOADJ.GES_PK_ID
      FROM
      	 ( SELECT GES_PK_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,BOOK_TYPE_CODE  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS 
      	     WHERE ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT<>0  
		     	AND JE_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL
		     	AND  GLOBAL_NAME='US'
		    union all
		     SELECT GES_PK_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,BOOK_TYPE_CODE  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS 
      	     WHERE  GLOBAL_NAME='BE'		     	
		  ) STMOADJ
      INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC  
           ON (STMOADJ.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
           AND STMOADJ.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME  
           AND EFABC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
           )    
	  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	       	  ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMOADJ.GLOBAL_NAME
     )SMOFADJ,
     (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
      FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL
     ) SFATMAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMOFATD
           WHERE SMOFADJ.SS_CODE = SMOFATD.SS_CD
                  and SMOFADJ.GES_PK_ID =SMOFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
                  and SMOFATD.SS_TABLE_CD='ADJ'
		     )

SELECT  
	RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOFDD.SS_CODE,SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID,SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE,SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER) + MAX_VAL FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY,
	SMOFDD.SS_CODE,
	SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID,
	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER ,
- (FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY+1000000)  as GES_PK_ID ,
	'DEP' as SS_TABLE_CD

FROM
	(
		SELECT
			NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE as SS_CODE,
			STMODD.DISTRIBUTION_ID,
			STMODD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			STMODD.PERIOD_COUNTER 	
		FROM 
			(
			SELECT DISTRIBUTION_ID,BOOK_TYPE_CODE,PERIOD_COUNTER,GLOBAL_NAME FROM  $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL 
			) STMODD 
		INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EFABC  
           ON (STMODD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=EFABC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
           AND STMODD.GLOBAL_NAME=EFABC.GLOBAL_NAME  
           AND EFABC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
           )    
	  	INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	       	  ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STMODD.GLOBAL_NAME
	)SMOFDD,	
    ( SELECT COALESCE (MAX ( FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY ), 0) MAX_VAL
      FROM  $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL
    ) SFTHMAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMFATDI
                      WHERE SMOFDD.SS_CODE = SMFATDI.SS_CD
						and SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID =SMFATDI.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
						and SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = SMFATDI.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD
						and SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER = SMFATDI.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT
						and SMFATDI.SS_TABLE_CD='DEP')

SELECT  	
SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY  AS FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY 
	,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	,COALESCE(EFDH.TRANSACTION_UNITS,0) AS ASSET_QTY
	,( CASE 
	      WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='CR' THEN 'CREDIT'
	      WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='DR' THEN 'DEBIT' 
	      END 
	 ) AS FA_TRANSACTION_DETAIL_TYPE  
	,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD  
	,SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE AS SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD        
	,SMOFA.DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	,SMOFA.PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED AS     SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
	,SMOFA.GES_PK_ID AS SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
	,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
	,NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT as JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT
	,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_CODE
	,NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT as JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
	,SMFAT.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY AS FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY
	,SMOFA.SOURCE_TYPE_CODE AS  BK_FA_TRANSACTION_DTL_TYPE_CD 
	,(CASE  WHEN SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='DR' 
			THEN COALESCE(SMOFA.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,0) 
			ELSE 0
	  END ) AS RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT     
	,COALESCE( CASE WHEN SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='DR' 
			        THEN EFL.SEGMENT1 ||'.'|| EFL.SEGMENT2 ||'.'||  EFL.SEGMENT3
			   END,  'UNKNOWN' ) AS RU_TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME    
	,(CASE  WHEN SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='CR' 
		    THEN COALESCE(SMOFA.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,0) 
		    ELSE 0
	  END ) AS RU_FA_TRANSACTION_CREDIT_AMT    
	,COALESCE(  CASE WHEN SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='CR' 
		             THEN EFL.SEGMENT1 ||'.'|| EFL.SEGMENT2 ||'.'||  EFL.SEGMENT3
		        END , 'UNKNOWN' )  AS RU_FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME    
		,EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER AS DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
	,NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT  
	,'ADJ' AS SS_TABLE_CD 
	,CASE WHEN SS_TABLE_CD ='ADJ' THEN 'A' ELSE 'D' END  AS FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE
	,SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE AS RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
	,SMOFA.PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED AS RU_BK_DPRCTN_PRD_SEQ_NUM_INT
	,SMOFA.ACTION_CODE
	,'I' AS DML_TYPE
	,EFDH.DATE_EFFECTIVE AS FA_TRX_DETAIL_EFFECTIVE_DTM
	,EFDH.DATE_INEFFECTIVE AS FA_TRX_DETAIL_INEFFECTIVE_DTM
	,0 AS CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
	,0 AS DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
	,0 AS YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
FROM
	(
	SELECT 
		GES_PK_ID,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
		DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG,
		PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED,
		JE_HEADER_ID,
		JE_LINE_NUM,
		TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
		SOURCE_TYPE_CODE ,
		ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,
		ASSET_ID,
		CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		ACTION_CODE
	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS
	 where  ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT<>0   
	 	AND JE_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL
	 	AND  GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	 UNION ALL
		 SELECT 
		GES_PK_ID,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
		DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG,
		PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED,
		JE_HEADER_ID,
		JE_LINE_NUM,
		TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
		SOURCE_TYPE_CODE ,
		ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,
		ASSET_ID,
		CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		ACTION_CODE
	FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_ADJUSTMENTS
	where GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	)SMOFA 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ADDITIONS_B EFAB     
	ON  (EFAB.ASSET_ID = SMOFA.ASSET_ID
	AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME )  
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (  SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
		AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME = ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
		) 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME)  
INNER JOIN 	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
		ON ( ELBC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
			AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOB.SS_CODE		
		 	) 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_DIST_HISTORY EFDH 
        ON  (SMOFA.DISTRIBUTION_ID = EFDH.DISTRIBUTION_ID
			AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME = EFDH.GLOBAL_NAME)   
INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_LOCATIONS  EFL
	ON  (EFDH.LOCATION_ID=EFL.LOCATION_ID
    	AND EFDH.GLOBAL_NAME=EFL.GLOBAL_NAME)  
INNER  JOIN  $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL  SMFATD  
	ON  (SMOFA.GES_PK_ID=SMFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
        AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SMFATD.SS_CD
		AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD= 'ADJ')   
INNER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON  (SMOFA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
 	AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY      = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )   
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION SMFAT
	ON  (SMOFA.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID=SMFAT.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT
        AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SMFAT.SS_CD)   
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
		ON  (SMOFA.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
		AND SMOFA.JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
		AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	 	AND  NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE		)   
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE 
		ON  (SMOFA.JE_HEADER_ID = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJE.SS_CD)
union all   /* Added this union all as part of CR to process ADjustnments records after BEDROCK*/
SELECT  	
SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY  AS FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY 
	,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	,COALESCE(EFDH.TRANSACTION_UNITS,0) AS ASSET_QTY
	,( CASE 
	      WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='CR' THEN 'CREDIT'
	      WHEN DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='DR' THEN 'DEBIT' 
	      END 
	 ) AS FA_TRANSACTION_DETAIL_TYPE  
	,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD  
	,SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE AS SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD        
	,SMOFA.DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	,SMOFA.PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED AS     SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
	,SMOFA.GES_PK_ID AS SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
	,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
	,-999 as JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT
	,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_CODE
	,-999 as JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
	,SMFAT.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY AS FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY
	,SMOFA.SOURCE_TYPE_CODE AS  BK_FA_TRANSACTION_DTL_TYPE_CD 
	,(CASE  WHEN SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='DR' 
			THEN COALESCE(SMOFA.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,0) 
			ELSE 0
	  END ) AS RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT     
	,COALESCE( CASE WHEN SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='DR' 
			        THEN EFL.SEGMENT1 ||'.'|| EFL.SEGMENT2 ||'.'||  EFL.SEGMENT3
			   END,  'UNKNOWN' ) AS RU_TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME    
	,(CASE  WHEN SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='CR' 
		    THEN COALESCE(SMOFA.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,0) 
		    ELSE 0
	  END ) AS RU_FA_TRANSACTION_CREDIT_AMT    
	,COALESCE(  CASE WHEN SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG='CR' 
		             THEN EFL.SEGMENT1 ||'.'|| EFL.SEGMENT2 ||'.'||  EFL.SEGMENT3
		        END , 'UNKNOWN' )  AS RU_FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME    
		,EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER AS DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
	, -999  AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT  
	,'ADJ' AS SS_TABLE_CD 
	,CASE WHEN SS_TABLE_CD ='ADJ' THEN 'A' ELSE 'D' END  AS FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE
	,SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE AS RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
	,SMOFA.PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED AS RU_BK_DPRCTN_PRD_SEQ_NUM_INT
	,SMOFA.ACTION_CODE
	,'I' AS DML_TYPE
	,EFDH.DATE_EFFECTIVE AS FA_TRX_DETAIL_EFFECTIVE_DTM
	,EFDH.DATE_INEFFECTIVE AS FA_TRX_DETAIL_INEFFECTIVE_DTM
	,0 AS CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
	,0 AS DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
	,0 AS YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
FROM
	(
	SELECT 
		GES_PK_ID,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
		DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG,
		PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED,
		JE_HEADER_ID,
		JE_LINE_NUM,
		TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
		SOURCE_TYPE_CODE ,
		ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,
		ASSET_ID,
		CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		ACTION_CODE
	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS
	 where  GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
	 UNION ALL
		 SELECT 
		GES_PK_ID,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
		DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG,
		PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED,
		JE_HEADER_ID,
		JE_LINE_NUM,
		TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
		SOURCE_TYPE_CODE ,
		ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,
		ASSET_ID,
		CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		ACTION_CODE
	FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_ADJUSTMENTS
	 where  GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
	)SMOFA 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ADDITIONS_B EFAB     
	ON  (EFAB.ASSET_ID = SMOFA.ASSET_ID
	AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME )  
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (  SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
		AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME = ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
		) 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME)  
INNER JOIN 	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
		ON ( ELBC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
			AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOB.SS_CODE		
		 	) 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_DIST_HISTORY EFDH 
        ON  (SMOFA.DISTRIBUTION_ID = EFDH.DISTRIBUTION_ID
			AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME = EFDH.GLOBAL_NAME)   
INNER  JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_LOCATIONS  EFL
	ON  (EFDH.LOCATION_ID=EFL.LOCATION_ID
    	AND EFDH.GLOBAL_NAME=EFL.GLOBAL_NAME)  
INNER  JOIN  $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL  SMFATD  
	ON  (SMOFA.GES_PK_ID=SMFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
        AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SMFATD.SS_CD
		AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD= 'ADJ')   
INNER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA /* Taking CODE_COMBINATION_ID from Dist_History After BEDROCK*/
	ON  (EFDH.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
 	AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY      = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )   
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION SMFAT
	ON  (SMOFA.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID=SMFAT.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT
        AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SMFAT.SS_CD)   
/* LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
		ON  (SMOFA.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
		AND SMOFA.JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
		AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	 	AND  NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE= NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE		)   
LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE 
		ON  (SMOFA.JE_HEADER_ID = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
		AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJE.SS_CD) */

SELECT 
WIFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY
,WIFATD.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,WIFATD.ASSET_QTY
,WIFATD.FA_TRANSACTION_DETAIL_TYPE  
,WIFATD.SS_CD   
,WIFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD   
,WIFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,WIFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
,WIFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
,WIFATD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,Coalesce(NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT, -999)  as  JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT
,WIFATD.COMPANY_CD
,Coalesce(NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT , -999)  as JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
,WIFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY
,WIFATD.BK_FA_TRANSACTION_DTL_TYPE_CD 
,WIFATD.RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT     
,WIFATD.RU_TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME    
,WIFATD.RU_FA_TRANSACTION_CREDIT_AMT    
,WIFATD.RU_FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME  
,WIFATD.DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
,Coalesce(NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT , -999) as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT  
,WIFATD.SS_TABLE_CD  
,WIFATD.FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE   
,WIFATD.RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD         
,WIFATD.RU_BK_DPRCTN_PRD_SEQ_NUM_INT  
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
,WIFATD.FA_TRX_DETAIL_EFFECTIVE_DTM
,WIFATD.FA_TRX_DETAIL_INEFFECTIVE_DTM 
,WIFATD.CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
,WIFATD.DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,WIFATD.YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL WIFATD
LEFT OUTER  JOIN  
(
SELECT  * FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL             
JOIN 
(SELECT
WIFATD.DV_JE_HEADER_ID
,WIFATD.DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM 
,WIFATD.DV_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
,WIFATD.DV_BK_COMPANY_CODE
 from $$STGDB.WI_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL WIFATD GROUP BY  1,2,3,4) WIFATD
 
ON(  WIFATD.DV_JE_HEADER_ID=NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT           
AND WIFATD.DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM =NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT        
AND WIFATD.DV_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY         
AND WIFATD.DV_BK_COMPANY_CODE= NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE )
 ) NJEL
	ON(  WIFATD.DV_JE_HEADER_ID=NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
	AND WIFATD.DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM =NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT
	AND WIFATD.DV_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND WIFATD.DV_BK_COMPANY_CODE= NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE	
	)     
LEFT OUTER JOIN  
(
SELECT  *  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
 JOIN
(SELECT DV_JE_HEADER_ID,DV_SS_CD FROM  $$STGDB.WI_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL GROUP BY 1,2) WIFATD
ON ( WIFATD.DV_JE_HEADER_ID=NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT             
AND WIFATD.DV_SS_CD=NJE.SS_CD )
 ) NJE 
	ON ( WIFATD.DV_JE_HEADER_ID=NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT 
	AND WIFATD.DV_SS_CD=NJE.SS_CD)

SELECT  
SMOFDD.BATCH_ID                      
,SMOFDD.ADDITION_COST_TO_CLEAR        
,SMOFDD.ASSET_ID                      
,SMOFDD.BONUS_DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT 
,SMOFDD.BONUS_DEPRN_AMOUNT            
,SMOFDD.BONUS_DEPRN_EXP_JE_LINE_NUM   
,SMOFDD.BONUS_DEPRN_RESERVE           
,SMOFDD.BONUS_DEPRN_RSV_JE_LINE_NUM   
,SMOFDD.BONUS_YTD_DEPRN               
,SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
,SMOFDD.COST                          
,SMOFDD.DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT       
,SMOFDD.DEPRN_AMOUNT                  
,SMOFDD.DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,SMOFDD.DEPRN_RESERVE                 
,SMOFDD.DEPRN_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,SMOFDD.DEPRN_RUN_DATE                
,SMOFDD.DEPRN_SOURCE_CODE             
,SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID               
,SMOFDD.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SMOFDD.JE_HEADER_ID                  
,SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER                
,SMOFDD.REVAL_AMORTIZATION            
,SMOFDD.REVAL_AMORT_JE_LINE_NUM       
,SMOFDD.REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE           
,SMOFDD.REVAL_RESERVE                 
,SMOFDD.REVAL_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,SMOFDD.YTD_DEPRN                     
,SMOFDD.YTD_REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE       
,SMOFDD.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SMOFDD.ACTION_CODE     
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE     
FROM
       (
		SELECT
			BATCH_ID                      
			,ADDITION_COST_TO_CLEAR        
			,ASSET_ID                      
			,BONUS_DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT 
			,BONUS_DEPRN_AMOUNT            
			,BONUS_DEPRN_EXP_JE_LINE_NUM   
			,BONUS_DEPRN_RESERVE           
			,BONUS_DEPRN_RSV_JE_LINE_NUM   
			,BONUS_YTD_DEPRN               
			,BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
			,COST                          
			,DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT       
			,DEPRN_AMOUNT                  
			,DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM
			,DEPRN_RESERVE                 
			,DEPRN_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM     
			,DEPRN_RUN_DATE                
			,DEPRN_SOURCE_CODE             
			,DISTRIBUTION_ID               
			,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
			,GLOBAL_NAME                   
			,JE_HEADER_ID
			,PERIOD_COUNTER                
			,REVAL_AMORTIZATION            
			,REVAL_AMORT_JE_LINE_NUM       
			,REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE           
			,REVAL_RESERVE                 
			,REVAL_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM     
			,YTD_DEPRN                     
			,YTD_REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE       
			,CREATE_DATETIME               
			,ACTION_CODE        
		   FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL
		  ) SMOFDD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE'
	)  
WHERE NOT EXISTS
		(  select 1 from $$WORKDB.W_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL WFATD,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=WFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
	AND   SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE= WFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD  
	AND	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER=WFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
	AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =WFATD.SS_CD
	AND WFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'DEP'
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
      AND JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT  <> -999 and JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT = -999
	)

SELECT 
SMOFA.BATCH_ID                      
,SMOFA.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT             
,SMOFA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               
,SMOFA.ANNUALIZED_ADJUSTMENT         
,SMOFA.ASSET_ID                      
,SMOFA.ASSET_INVOICE_ID              
,SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
,SMOFA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,SMOFA.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG             
,SMOFA.DEPRN_OVERRIDE_FLAG           
,SMOFA.DISTRIBUTION_ID               
,SMOFA.GES_PK_ID                     
,SMOFA.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SMOFA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            
,SMOFA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            
,SMOFA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            
,SMOFA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             
,SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SMOFA.JE_HEADER_ID                  
,SMOFA.JE_LINE_NUM                   
,SMOFA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SMOFA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SMOFA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,SMOFA.PERIOD_COUNTER_ADJUSTED       
,SMOFA.PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED        
,SMOFA.SOURCE_TYPE_CODE              
,SMOFA.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID         
,SMOFA.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SMOFA.ACTION_CODE 
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
  (
	SELECT  	
		BATCH_ID                      
		,ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT             
		,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               
		,ANNUALIZED_ADJUSTMENT         
		,ASSET_ID                      
		,ASSET_INVOICE_ID              
		,BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
		,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG             
		,DEPRN_OVERRIDE_FLAG           
		,DISTRIBUTION_ID               
		,GES_PK_ID                     
		,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            
		,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            
		,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            
		,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             
		,GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,JE_HEADER_ID                  
		,JE_LINE_NUM                   
		,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
		,PERIOD_COUNTER_ADJUSTED       
		,PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED        
		,SOURCE_TYPE_CODE              
		,TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID         
		,CREATE_DATETIME               
		,ACTION_CODE    
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS 
		WHERE   ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT<>0   AND JE_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL and GLOBAL_NAME='US'
		union all
			SELECT  	
		BATCH_ID                      
		,ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT             
		,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               
		,ANNUALIZED_ADJUSTMENT         
		,ASSET_ID                      
		,ASSET_INVOICE_ID              
		,BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
		,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
		,DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG             
		,DEPRN_OVERRIDE_FLAG           
		,DISTRIBUTION_ID               
		,GES_PK_ID                     
		,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            
		,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            
		,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            
		,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             
		,GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,JE_HEADER_ID                  
		,JE_LINE_NUM                   
		,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
		,PERIOD_COUNTER_ADJUSTED       
		,PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED        
		,SOURCE_TYPE_CODE              
		,TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID         
		,CREATE_DATETIME               
		,ACTION_CODE    
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS 
		WHERE  GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
		
)SMOFA 

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE'
	)  

WHERE NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM  $$WORKDB.W_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL WFATD,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	  where   SMOFA.GES_PK_ID=WFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
        AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=WFATD.SS_CD
        		AND    WFATD.SS_TABLE_CD= 'ADJ'   
        		AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
 	)

SELECT   
 SMOFDD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY AS FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY
	,NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	,COALESCE(EFDH.TRANSACTION_UNITS,0) AS ASSET_QTY
	, 'DEBIT' AS FA_TRANSACTION_DETAIL_TYPE  
	,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  AS SS_CD   
	,SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE AS SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD        
	,SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID AS SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	,SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER AS     SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
	, -999 AS SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
	,NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY as  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
	,NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS COMPANY_CODE
	,NFAT.FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY  AS FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION_KEY
	,'SCHEDULED DEPRICIATION' AS  BK_FA_TRANSACTION_DTL_TYPE_CD 
	,COALESCE(SMOFDD.DEPRN_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_FA_TRANSACTION_DEBIT_AMT     
	,COALESCE(  EFL.SEGMENT1 ||'.'|| EFL.SEGMENT2 ||'.'||  EFL.SEGMENT3 , 'UNKNOWN' ) AS RU_TO_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME    
	, 0  AS RU_FA_TRANSACTION_CREDIT_AMT    
	,'UNKNOWN'  AS RU_FROM_PHYSICAL_LOCATION_NAME    
	,EFAB.ASSET_NUMBER AS DD_FIXED_ASSET_NUM 
   ,'DEP' AS SS_TABLE_CD  
   ,DV_JE_HEADER_ID
   ,DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM
   ,CASE WHEN SMOFDD.DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM = -999  OR  DV_JE_HEADER_ID= -999
                THEN  'UNKNOWN' 
                ELSE  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
      END AS DV_SS_CD
   ,CAST( CASE WHEN SMOFDD.DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM = -999  OR  DV_JE_HEADER_ID= -999
            	THEN  '-999' 
            	ELSE  NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
       END   as INTEGER) AS DV_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
    ,CAST( CASE WHEN SMOFDD.DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM = -999  OR  DV_JE_HEADER_ID= -999
         		 THEN  'UNK' 
         		 ELSE  NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
        END  as CHAR(3)) AS DV_BK_COMPANY_CODE
,CASE WHEN SS_TABLE_CD ='ADJ' THEN 'A' ELSE 'D' END  AS FA_TRX_DEPRECIATION_ROLE
,SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE AS RU_BK_FA_BOOK_TYPE_CD
,SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER AS RU_BK_DPRCTN_PRD_SEQ_NUM_INT
,EFDH.DATE_EFFECTIVE AS FA_TRX_DETAIL_EFFECTIVE_DTM
,EFDH.DATE_INEFFECTIVE AS FA_TRX_DETAIL_INEFFECTIVE_DTM
,SMOFDD.COST AS CURRENT_COST_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,SMOFDD.DEPRN_RESERVE AS DEPRN_RESERVE_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,SMOFDD.YTD_DEPRN AS YR_TO_DT_DEPRN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
FROM
       (
        SELECT
        	FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY,
			BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME,
			DISTRIBUTION_ID,
			PERIOD_COUNTER,
			ASSET_ID,
			COALESCE(DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM,-999)as DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM,
			COALESCE(JE_HEADER_ID,-999) as DV_JE_HEADER_ID,
			DEPRN_AMOUNT,
			COST  ,
			DEPRN_RESERVE ,
			YTD_DEPRN
	   FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL SMOFDD
	   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
	
	INNER  JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMFATD 
	ON ( 	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=SMFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
	AND   SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE= SMFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD  
	AND	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER=SMFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
	AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =SMFATD.SS_CD
	AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'DEP')  
	
	   UNION ALL
	   
   SELECT 
      FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY,
			BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME,
			DISTRIBUTION_ID,
			PERIOD_COUNTER,
			ASSET_ID,
			COALESCE(DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM,-999)as DV_DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM,
			COALESCE(JE_HEADER_ID,-999) as DV_JE_HEADER_ID,
			DEPRN_AMOUNT,
			COST ,
			DEPRN_RESERVE ,
			YTD_DEPRN
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL   SMOFDD
		
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
	
	INNER  JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMFATD 
	ON ( 	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=SMFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
	AND   SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE= SMFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD  
	AND	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER=SMFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
	AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =SMFATD.SS_CD
	AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'DEP')  
	 ) SMOFDD  

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE')  

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME

INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_ADDITIONS_B EFAB                          
	ON( EFAB.ASSET_ID = SMOFDD.ASSET_ID
	AND EFAB.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME ) 

INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_DIST_HISTORY EFDH
	ON (SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=EFDH.DISTRIBUTION_ID 
	AND	SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=EFDH.GLOBAL_NAME)  

INNER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_LOCATIONS  EFL
	ON(EFDH.LOCATION_ID=EFL.LOCATION_ID 
	AND EFDH.GLOBAL_NAME=EFL.GLOBAL_NAME)  

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB                   
	ON (ELBC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID=NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT 
	AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOB.SS_CODE)  

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON (NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT=EFDH.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
	AND NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY=NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)  

INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRANSACTION NFAT
	ON ( EFDH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_IN=NFAT.SK_TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID_INT
	AND	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NFAT.SS_CD)
